debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
net : BiasedHopfieldNetwork n
x : HopfieldState n
i : Fin n
⊢ biasedEnergyDiff n net x i =
    -(SpinState.toReal (biasedUpdateState n net x i i) - (x i).toReal) * biasedLocalField n net x i

failed_attempts:
let h_net := net.toHopfieldNetwork
  let x' := biasedUpdateState net x i
  have h_rel (y) : biasedEnergy net y = h_net.energy y

let h_net := net.toHopfieldNetwork
  let y := biasedUpdateState net x i
  let Δs := (y i).toReal

let h := net.toHopfieldNetwork
  let x' := biasedUpdateState net x i
  let Δs := (x' i).toReal

simp only [biasedEnergyDiff, biasedLocalField, biasedEnergy]
  let x' := biasedUpdateState net x i
  let Δs := (x' i).toReal - (x i).toReal

let hnet := net.toHopfieldNetwork
  let x' := biasedUpdateState net x i
  have h_split : ∀ y, biasedEnergy net y = hnet.energy y

let x' := biasedUpdateState net x i
  let diff := (x' i).toReal - (x i).toReal

let net' := net.toHopfieldNetwork
  let x' := biasedUpdateState net x i
  have h_energy : ∀ y, biasedEnergy net y = net'.energy y

let net' := net.toHopfieldNetwork
  let x' := biasedUpdateState net x i
  let diff := (x' i).toReal - (x i).toReal

let net' := net.toHopfieldNetwork
  let x' := biasedUpdateState net x i
  let Δs := (x' i).toReal - (x i).toReal

let hnet := net.toHopfieldNetwork
  let x' := biasedUpdateState net x i
  have h_energy : ∀ y, biasedEnergy net y = hnet.energy y

let net' := net.toHopfieldNetwork
  let x' := biasedUpdateState net x i
  let s := x' i
  let ds := s.toReal

let hnet := net.toHopfieldNetwork
  have h_energy : ∀ y, biasedEnergy net y = hnet.energy y - Finset.sum Finset.univ (fun k => net.bias k * (y k).toReal) := by
    intro y
    simp [biasedEnergy, HopfieldNetwork.energy, Finset.sum_add_distrib, mul_add, sub_eq_add_neg]
    ring
  rw [biasedEnergyDiff, h_energy, h_energy]
  set x' := biasedUpdateState net x i
  let Δx := (x' i).toReal - (x i).toReal
  have h_bias : (Finset.sum Finset.univ (fun k => net.bias k * (x' k).toReal)) - (Finset.sum Finset.univ (fun k => net.bias k * (x k).toReal)) = net.bias i * Δx := by
    rw [← Finset.sum_sub_distrib]
    refine Finset.sum_eq_single i (fun k _ hk => ?_) (fun _ => by contradiction)
    simp [x', biasedUpdateState, Function.update_noteq hk]
